name: @borjie/fleet-management
description: Fleet management module: vehicle registry, driver registry, trip tracking, maintenance schedules, fuel tracking, telematics integration (Samsara/Geotab/mock), route optimisation, dispatch, TCO + driver scorecards, and compliance watchers (license + insurance + roadworthiness expiry). Multi-tenant from row one; optional peer on @borjie/geo-intelligence for map/geofence overlays.
